item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
not sure if that's true but ok.. greetings online friends
every time
seems about right
a long time ago they had actual history related stuff. i think
yes
mmm hmm
gary oldman 'everyone' gif from the professional
never use right shift
i don't recommend smoking before/at work
i guess
i feel like this is attacking me
not a fan of time
finally
wondering how he participated
wouldn't I?
easy one. rogen
i take solace in that
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: HELP PLEASE HELP
item.description:
Introduction
Section 1
Section 2
Section 3
Section 4
Section 5
Section 6
Section 7
Section 8
Reminder that gender affirming care for youth is well established and effective: https://juliaserano.medium.com/gender-affirming-care-for-trans-youth-is-neither-new-nor-experimental-a-timeline-and-compilation-b4bb8375d797
WE MUST NOT LET THIS CONTINUE. WE MUST FIGHT FOR OUR RIGHT TO EXIST AND RECEIVE THE MEDICAL CARE WE NEED. Edit: If anyone wants to help me and my spouse specifically, here's a link to my ko-fi, but I don't expect it at this point. I don't even know how I'm going to escape at this point at all. It's basically too late for us. https://ko-fi.com/chaosbuni/goal?g=1 Edit 2: Erin just wrote up a post regarding yesterday's military ban. https://open.substack.com/pub/erininthemorn/p/the-chilling-line-trump-just-crossed?utm_source=share&utm_medium=android&r=2dhxde
item.dc:creator: chaosbuni

item.title: Some memes for these trying times
item.description:
I see no downside here
I need to try this out some time, I don’t have a blahaj, yet….
This describes my life trajectory maybe a little too much
Maybe one day I’ll have this type of confidence. Goals!
I think the short days are getting to me, because I feel this
Sudo apt install thigh_highs
That’s where mine lives
I’ve had a few moments like this lately
That’s all. I hope you have a terrific Tuesday ❤️

item.title: Transgirl Tuesday ed. 25
item.description:
Cassidy Cauley
Cienna Rosalina
DawnisPacked
Yurtgirl Sophie
Grace Hyland
Amara
NayNay Michelle
Stephany Gonzalez
Venus Moores
Trixie Maristella
xJessyTS
Cailey
Alisia Rae
BonnietheDoll
Nano Nano Hi @MadSovereignMary @dickblack12 @Shenaniganz80 @MermaidNinja @secretlyacd @deaddogsmuggler @JohnWickdidnothingwrong @Ngugi @OldBikerDude @Kevinbfree @applesugar @DaymanAhAAAAah Happy Tuesday, and welcome to my 25th take, to show love, support, and respect to trans women. Hope you’re all having a nice day and, if it’s not a nice day, I hope the sky rains fire on your enemies. Lemme know if you’d like a tag when I post these
item.dc:creator: jonhamsandwich11

item.title: Still relevant.
item.description: Saved this 4-5 years ago, still true today. Good luck to those that voted against the current shitshow!
item.dc:creator: JayL80

item.title: I'm a little slow, guys...
item.description: My therapist didn't say this in a negative way, but that was her observation. If she didn't know better, she would have thought that he died a few months ago based on my grieving process. It was eye-opening, but also kind of discouraging. I have such a long way to go. I'd probably heal faster if I wanted to. But I think I'm still at the point where healing feels like betrayal. I know that my husband wouldn't want that. He'd want me to heal. Welp... at least I'm in counseling again so that's something, right?
item.dc:creator: Marowen

item.title: Less politics, more pierogi
item.description:
The first thing i posted to this site was a video of pierogi cooking in bacon grease. Full circle…
I’ll admit when i posted a similar thing years ago i was called out for lack of onions, and lied about it to fit in. I don’t like onions. Thiccccc sour cream

item.title: In memory of Norbert the dog who passed away on Jan 26.
item.description:
Followed Norbert for years and his posts would always brighten my day. He was so small but he made such a big impact. He will be missed but never forgotten.
https://www.instagram.com/p/DFVulday7_l

item.title: The 502nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
This week, I'm once again asking for your monetary support for a good cause. An online friend of mine has to move in a few weeks and needs help rehoming her cat, because she cannot take her with. She already has a home found for the catto, but needs help with vet and food bills so the nice old lady taking the cat will not have to spend her Social Security check to do it. If you can give any money to help with these costs, please donate! The catto will be very happy if you do! https://gofund.me/35567dd8
@Kaeldra
Memes about memes? Memeception?!
Me In IRL Life
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This also the last week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
Incredibly tough decision
I don't think those percentages are accurate
Rookie Numbers
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: I admit it, I'm a repeat offender!
item.description:
Slight correction, I do sell if there really isn't a reason to keep the older format. I sell the cheap stuff for dirt, but I mostly keep old formats since I do have a means to play all of them. Plus, sometimes it's cool to watch how far we have come quality wise for home media. Anyway, here are a few, but not all, of my repeat offenses.
Titanic, of course. I'm a nut for all things Titanic so it only makes sense
My absolute favorite horror film.
Here is some more of my Titanic stuff.
Star wars VHS, then project 4K77 burned onto physical discs, and the official 2011 fox release.
I even have classics!
None of these movies really fit together genre wise..
Interesting note for Psycho, the Blu Ray is before they found and released the full cut of Psycho. Up until then, all we had on home media was a censored TV cut. The middle 4K is the first release of the full theatrical cut. The Arrow Video 4K came in a box set.
Of course, The Evil Dead looks best on VHS.
Got two really nice Exorcist boxes
Jaws is blu ray to 4k, IT is DVD to Blu Ray
Bonus, I also do this shit for music.
item.dc:creator: TheWonderfulWorldOfDickButt

item.title: Wednesday Stolen Meme Dump #821
item.description:
1. Scottish lads are always good fun
2. There's two types of people
3. WHY, WHY?! Always works like this
4. SNU SNU
5
6. Might be one of the great magic tricks I have ever seen
7. Fish be like
8. Anyone in the army can confirm this
9. Baller move
10. "All right guys get ready for training..."
13. Watching the Monaco Grand Prix onboards be like
14. These ladies know whatsup
15. Accurate (except the part that anyone thinks I'm a pro game dev) On a side note, I want share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I am also working on my own wacky narrative game called Do Not Press The Button (Or You'll Delete The Multiverse). Is it funny? Who knows? Is the humor good? Certainly I have no idea! But I did my best, based on years of internet meme consumption. Anyway if you would like to support my work, please take a second to wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Dedicated to people who tell the song to “shut up” before they skip it
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: A small request for help...
item.description: I'll update this with a summary once I've vetted as many suggestions as I can. If you've personally utilized a resource that has already been posted, add a comment to it and upvote it. I am specifically looking for American resources, though that does extend to potential emigration options so if there is resources in that vein they are welcome. EDIT: Initial aggregation has been done, but please, keep sharing any resources you can! Anything from potential underground railroad projects to LGBTQ+ asylum information to crisis counseling! What has been gathered so far is below. Prescriptions: https://hrtcafe.net/ https://canadaprescriptionsplus.com https://www.goodrx.com/ https://www.markcubancostplusdrugcompany.com/ https://www.singlecare.com https://www.needymeds.org/ Planned Parenthood (In the event of your doctor discontinuing your prescription(s) (HRT specific possibly?)) Activism Information: https://indivisible.org/omb Haven States: - New England - New Jersey - New York - Massachusetts My own digging has also found this, specifically from the govt of Canada website: https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/refugees/about-refugee-system/2slgbtqi-plus.html So far nothing about US citizens explicitly but, well, I'm writing a few letters and I encourage any other Canucks to do the same if you can. Addendum: I'm now aware of the connotations of the (full) leopards-eating-faces phrase and that was a poor choice of words on my part; that said, even though they absolutely didn't vote for it, the leopards don't seem to particularly care whos face they eat. Also I'm very bad at metaphors. 2nd Addendum: Imgur is being a right-royal pain
item.dc:creator: MythIncarnate
